title: StorageBox for Fabric
description: StorageBox for Fabric. Store a large number of one item.
body:
Add an item that can hold an almost infinite number of items. This is still incomplete and the reproducibility is low now.
Put in Storage Box or put in Storage Box from Container: Colon key(Default)
Put out from Storage Box or put out from Storage Box and put in Container: Colon key(Default) + Shift
Put out from Storage Box and drop: Colon key(Default) + Shift + Ctrl
Switch Auto Collect: Colon key(Default) + Ctrl Check here for the recipe↓ [Forge version(another author)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storagebox-mod) (Unyuho様へ許可を得てFabric用へ改変してみたのですが、結局失敗し、参考にさせてもらいながらコードを1から書かせていただきました。リソースパックのみ使わせてもらっています。申し訳ないです。)
